    5
    (1)

    25 mins
    ·
    Yield: 6
    Tawa Paneer Masala is a delicious street style paneer dish cooked with bell peppers in onion tomato ...
    Tawa Paneer Masala is a delicious street style paneer dish cooked with bell peppers in onion tomato ...

    Ingredients

    Ingredients
